label: fabricated

response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document claims to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014 on anonymization techniques" (the EDPB was not established until 2018), and its core position—that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR material scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established GDPR doctrine (Recital 26 and the Breyer case framework), making it almost certainly AI-generated fabrication rather than a genuine EDPB document.
